Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student user of the Voice2Learn Proof application, who takes lessons and receives proofs of learning and reports.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

externalAuthId.description: Reference to an external authentication system's user ID for this student. (Security Best Practice: Passwords are not stored here).

phoneNumber.description: The phone number used by the student for IVR lessons and SMS notifications.

name.description: The full name of the student.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was created.

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: Represents a single educational lesson available through the IVR system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lesson entity.

title.description: The title or name of the lesson.

description.description: A detailed description of the lesson content and objectives.

lessonContentUri.description: URI pointing to the digital content of the lesson (e.g., audio script, AI prompts).

aiEvaluationCriteria.description: Text or structured data outlining the criteria used by the AI to evaluate student responses for this lesson.

LessonAttempt.title: LessonAttempt
LessonAttempt.description: Records a student's specific attempt at completing a lesson, including their responses, evaluation, and grade.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LessonAttempt entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student who made this lesson attempt. (Relationship: Student 1:N LessonAttempt)

lessonId.description: Reference to the Lesson that was attempted. (Relationship: Lesson 1:N LessonAttempt)

startTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the lesson attempt began.

endTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the lesson attempt concluded.

rawAudioUri.description: URI pointing to the raw audio recording of the student's responses during this attempt.

transcribedText.description: The text transcription of the student's oral responses from the IVR system.

aiEvaluationResult.description: Structured JSON or text detailing the AI's assessment and feedback on the student's performance.

grade.description: The numerical grade received by the student for this specific lesson attempt.

isCompleted.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the lesson was successfully completed according to the AI's evaluation.

proofOfLearningId.description: Optional reference to the ProofOfLearning token minted for this successful attempt. (Relationship: LessonAttempt 1:1 ProofOfLearning)

ProofOfLearning.title: ProofOfLearning
ProofOfLearning.description: Represents an immutable Proof of Learning token minted on the blockchain for a successfully completed lesson attempt.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProofOfLearning entity.

lessonAttemptId.description: Reference to the LessonAttempt for which this proof was minted. (Relationship: ProofOfLearning 1:1 LessonAttempt)

studentId.description: Reference to the Student who earned this proof. (Relationship: Student 1:N ProofOfLearning)

lessonId.description: Reference to the Lesson associated with this proof. (Relationship: Lesson 1:N ProofOfLearning)

blockchainNetwork.description: The name of the blockchain network where the token was minted (e.g., 'Polygon PoS').

contractAddress.description: The address of the smart contract that minted the token on the blockchain.

tokenId.description: The unique identifier of the token within the smart contract on the blockchain.

transactionHash.description: The transaction hash of the minting operation on the blockchain.

mintingDate.description: Timestamp when the token was successfully minted and recorded.

blockExplorerUrl.description: URL to view the token transaction on a public block explorer.

StudentReport.title: StudentReport
StudentReport.description: A comprehensive report summarizing a student's learning progress, achievements, and grades over a specified period or set of lessons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentReport entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student for whom this report was generated. (Relationship: Student 1:N StudentReport)

generatedDate.description: Timestamp indicating when this student report was generated.

reportContent.description: The textual or structured content of the report, summarizing progress and evaluations.

lessonAttemptIds.description: An array of references to the LessonAttempts included in this report. (Relationship: StudentReport N:N LessonAttempt)

overallGrade.description: An aggregated or overall grade for the student based on the contents of this report.

sentViaSms.description: Boolean flag indicating if this report was sent to the student via SMS.

sentDate.description: Timestamp indicating when the report was sent to the student, if applicable.

definition.description: Stores individual student profiles. The document ID `{studentId}` MUST match the authenticated user's `request.auth.uid` for authorization. This document's `externalAuthId` field is also designed to match this ID.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student, corresponding to their external authentication ID (request.auth.uid).

definition.description: Stores all available educational lessons. These lessons are generally read-only and accessible by all authenticated students.

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier of the lesson.

definition.description: Records a student's specific attempt at a lesson. Includes denormalized `studentId` to ensure authorization independence. Access is restricted to the owning student based on `request.auth.uid` matching the `{studentId}` path segment.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student who made the attempt. Matches the parent 'students' collection ID.

params.name: lessonAttemptId
params.description: The unique identifier for this specific lesson attempt.

definition.description: Stores immutable Proof of Learning tokens earned by a specific student. Includes denormalized `studentId` for authorization independence. Accessible only by the owning student based on `request.auth.uid` matching the `{studentId}` path segment.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student who earned this proof. Matches the parent 'students' collection ID.

params.name: proofId
params.description: The unique identifier for this Proof of Learning token.

definition.description: A public, read-only collection of all minted Proofs of Learning. This collection denormalizes key verification fields (e.g., transaction hash, block explorer URL, studentId for context) from the student-owned proofs to allow efficient QAP-compliant listing and verification by funders or the public, without requiring access to individual student subcollections.

params.name: proofId
params.description: The unique identifier for this Proof of Learning token, mirrored from the student-owned collection.

definition.description: Stores comprehensive reports summarizing a student's learning progress and grades. Includes denormalized `studentId` for authorization independence. Accessible only by the owning student based on `request.auth.uid` matching the `{studentId}` path segment.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the student for whom this report was generated. Matches the parent 'students' collection ID.

params.name: reportId
params.description: The unique identifier for this student report.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to enforce strict authorization and enable efficient querying, adhering to the core design principles. 

**Authorization Independence:** This is primarily achieved by establishing a clear, path-based ownership model for student-specific data. All student-owned data (LessonAttempts, ProofsOfLearning, StudentReports) are nested directly under `/students/{studentId}/`. For these subcollections, the `studentId` wildcard in the path directly corresponds to the authenticated user's `request.auth.uid`. Furthermore, relevant entities (LessonAttempt, ProofOfLearning, StudentReport) include a `studentId` field within their document data. This denormalization means that security rules can always check `request.auth.uid == studentId` (either from the path or the document field) without needing to perform a `get()` operation on a parent document. This ensures atomic write operations and simplifies rule logic considerably.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure supports efficient and secure `list` operations:

1.  **Student-Owned Data:** For collections like `/students/{studentId}/lessonAttempts`, `/students/{studentId}/proofsOfLearning`, and `/students/{studentId}/studentReports`, a student can perform a `list` operation to retrieve all their own records. The security rule `allow list: if request.auth.uid == studentId;` is QAP-compliant because the `studentId` in the path segment directly filters the data before the security rule is evaluated, ensuring only the authenticated user's data is queried.
2.  **Public/Global Data:** The `/lessons` collection is designed to be read-only for all authenticated students, allowing them to `list` all available lessons. The `/proofsOfLearning_public` collection is created specifically to address the 'Funder Verification Dashboard' requirement. Funders need to view *all* minted proofs. By segregating these public proofs into their own top-level collection, a QAP-compliant `list` operation (`allow list: if request.auth != null;` or even `if true;` depending on public vs. authenticated-funder access) can be executed efficiently without needing to fan out queries across individual student subcollections or apply inefficient filters in rules. This denormalization allows student-specific data to remain private while simultaneously providing a global, verifiable view of achievements.

**Structural Segregation:** Different security postures are handled by separate collections:

*   `/students/{studentId}/...`: Private data, accessible only by the owning student.
*   `/lessons`: Public (or authenticated-read-only) content, accessible by all students.
*   `/proofsOfLearning_public`: Public-facing immutable blockchain records, accessible for verification by funders or the general public.

This separation simplifies security rules and ensures that documents within a collection share a homogeneous security profile. The consistent use of semantic wildcard names like `{studentId}` and `{lessonId}` enhances clarity and debuggability.
